name: Transition Metals Corp.
summary: Transition Metals Corp. engages in the acquisition and exploration of mineral properties in Canada and the United States. It explores for gold, copper, nickel, platinum, and palladium projects, which include Thunder Bay Ni-Cu-PGM's, Nunavut, Saskatchewan Copper, and Abitibi gold projects. The company also has an option to acquire a 100% interest in the Aylmer IOCG property consisting of 43 mining claims covering an area of 1,455 hectares located in the north of Lake Wanapitei near Sudbury, Ontario. Transition Metals Corp. was incorporated in 2009 and is based in Sudbury, Canada.
